latest.title: Oriental garden lizard climbs in plain sight
latest.script_key: this lizard looks stuck because it s climbing straight up a tree trunk that s normal its claws grip microscopic grooves you can t see it s heading for the sunny branches above to hunt bugs and impress other lizards did you think lizards only ran on the ground

latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
latest.script_key: half the moon is always lit by the sun it s not dark on one side that s why we only ever see one face from earth the far side just isn t the far side all month long fun fact it s covered in craters because it never faces us

latest.title: Dragonfly eyes see more than you think
latest.script_key: their bulbous eyes aren t just decoration they re made of 30 000 tiny lenses packed side by side that s why they see in every direction at once even what s behind them watch this one twice notice how the eye edges blur while the middle stays sharp

latest.title: Asian elephants don't sweat they spray
latest.script_key: this trunk isn t just for drinking watch the tip curl up it s a built in shower head that splash is elephant air conditioning because their skin s too thick to sweat that s why they never overheat like us so next time you see one flapping its ears ask yourself how would you stay cool this way
